title: Oru Kal Oru Kannadi Lyrics Siva Manasula Sakthi
stanzas:

<div>
Oru Kal Oru Kannadi Lyrics Siva Manasula Sakthi

Oru kal oru kannadi
udaiyaamal modhikondal
kadhal

oru sol sila mounangal
pesaamal pesikondaal
kadhal.

kangal rendil
kadhal vandhaal
kanneer mattum
thunaiyaagume.

Oru kal oru kannadi
udaiyaamal modhikondal
kadhal

oru sol sila mounangal
pesaamal pesikondaal
kadhal.

thimirukku maru peyar neethaane
thinam thinam unnaal irandhene
marandhida mattum marandhene

theeyana purindhum adi naane
thirumbavum unai thoda
vandhene
therindhe sugamaai erindhene

kadum vishathinai
eduthu kudithaalum
adi konja neram kalithe
uyir pogum.
indha kadhalile
udane uyir pogum

kadhal endraal penne
chithravathai thaane.

Oru kal oru kannadi
udaiyaamal modhikondal
kadhal

oru sol sila mounangal
pesaamal pesikondaal
kadhal.

un mugam paarthe
naan ezhuven
un kural kettaal
naan ariven
un nizhaludane
naan varuven.

punnagai seithaal
uyir vaazhven.
purakkanithaal naan
ennaaven.
penne engae naan poven.

un udhatukkul irukkum
oru vaarthai.
adhai sollivittaal
thodangum en vaazhkai
mounathathil irukkum
enna valigal

kadhal endraal mella
saadhal endru solla

Oru kal oru kannadi
udaiyaamal modhikondal
kadhal

oru sol sila mounangal
pesaamal pesikondaal
kadhal.

kangal rendil
kadhal vandhaal
kanneer mattum
thunaiyaagume.

Oru kal oru kannadi
udaiyaamal modhikondal
kadhal

oru sol sila mounangal
pesaamal pesikondaal
kadhal.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Oru Kal Oru Kannadi explores themes of love and connection, emphasizing the beauty of unspoken emotions.

In which movie is this song featured?

The song is from the movie Siva Manasula Sakthi.

Who are the singer and music director of this song?

The details about the singer and music director are currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on February 14, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Kal Oru Kannadi, the lyrics beautifully depict the nuances of love, where silence speaks volumes. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia, reminding listeners of the tender moments shared between lovers. It serves as a perfect backdrop for romantic occasions, encapsulating the essence of heartfelt emotions. The soothing melody and poignant lyrics make it a timeless piece that resonates with anyone who has loved deeply.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Kal Oru Kannadi is a beautifully crafted melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With its soothing lyrics and nostalgic vibe, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. The enchanting composition makes it a must-listen for fans of Siva Manasula Sakthi.
stanzaMeanings: Oru Kal Oru Kannadi Lyrics Siva Manasula Sakthi
When love is expressed without a mirror, it becomes beautiful.
Some words speak without saying anything, that's how love communicates.
When love comes in both eyes, tears become the only companion.
When love is expressed without a mirror, it becomes beautiful.
Some words speak without saying anything, that's how love communicates.
You are the other name for my pride; every day I forget you but never forget my pride.
I understood the burning truth and returned to you, knowing that I am happy with you.
Even if I drink the bitter poison, it will take a moment for life to leave. In this love, life leaves instantly.
If love means anything, it is like a beautiful painting.
When love is expressed without a mirror, it becomes beautiful.
Some words speak without saying anything, that's how love communicates.
When I see your face, I rise; when I hear your voice, I understand. I will come to you only in your shadow.
If I smile, I will live; if I frown, what will I become? Where will I go, my dear?
There is a word in your lips; if I say it, my life will begin in this silence.
Love means to say it softly.
When love is expressed without a mirror, it becomes beautiful.
Some words speak without saying anything, that's how love communicates.
When love comes in both eyes, tears become the only companion.
When love is expressed without a mirror, it becomes beautiful.
Some words speak without saying anything, that's how love communicates.
